    • help Toyota

IT’S JUST THAT EASY TO SELL YOUR CAR!

Ready?
Get Started Now!

GET READY

Share some simple details and will provide a Express Cash Offer. Morgan gives you more!

GET SET

You can trade in your old vehicle for a new one, or sell it to us. We’ll buy your car if you don’t buy from us.

GET CHECK

After a quick on-site inspection of your vehicle, we’ll hand you a check or you can trade it in for a new ride!

we'll beat any offer or give you $500!*

Select you preferred drop off location.

Must present a current (within 7 days or 500 miles) written offer from competing dealership or company within 30 miles of chosen Morgan Automotive Group dealership. Not valid on online offers; offer must be signed by a competitor’s representative after in-person vehicle inspection. Morgan Automotive reserves the right to match the written offer. Not valid on past transactions. See dealer for details. The dealership will conduct a mandatory vehicle inspection free of charge to verify the accuracy of the vehicle description and condition information that you provided to us online. This verification inspection may include, for example, paint thickness measurements, a road test, a mechanical inspection, and a review of vehicle history reports and disclosure statements regarding flood, salvage, or odometer discrepancies (including rollbacks), and the like. We may raise or lower the dollar amount of your Express Cash Offer prior to redemption based on the information revealed by the inspection. All decisions by the Dealer regarding the condition of your vehicle will be final. At the conclusion of your vehicle verification inspection, you can redeem your Express Cash Offer. *Must have title at time of offer to receive a check the same day. Out-of-state (non-Florida) titles are not eligible to receive a same-day check. Some lease companies require selling dealer to purchase vehicle. As a result, we may not be able to purchase your lease vehicle and you may have to go to originating dealer. See dealer for details. **Same Day check are not available on Sunday Transactions.

Morgan Auto Group
